sprint_window: 2026-07-04 → 2026-07-17 (14 days; starts day after Sprint 3 close)
mvp_target: Stabilize Sprint 3 P0 deploy automation + close doctrine gaps surfaced by RCA-1→RCA-15 chain
grooming_notes: PM-groomed from Issue #176 (orchestrator kickoff) + RETRO-003 §Sprint 4 must-haves. Sprint 3 closed in incident-mode (14 RCAs); Sprint 4 is stabilization + doctrine consolidation. 3 P0 stories are RCA-driven (E2E deploy verification + auto-revert fix + RCA-15 pre-req race close). 5 P1 stories are doctrine/tooling follow-ups from Sprint 1+2+3 lessons. 3 P2 stories are backlog overflow.

stories.title: E2E deploy verification harness (Sprint 3 P0 DoD §5 carry + RCA-15 service persistence)
depends_on: Issue #175 (RCA-15 owner pre-req must be applied first)
scope_includes: Test harness: run 3+ consecutive auto-deploys, verify service alive 5+ min after each
Service persistence test: ss -tlnp 'sport = :8000' shows uvicorn alive post-deploy
systemctl --user is-active atilcalc-web.service returns 'active' between deploys
Owner apply pre-req: loginctl enable-linger atilcan + unit file at ~/.config/systemd/user/
scripts/tests/d019-e2e-deploy-verify.sh (regression test for the harness)
stories.issue_pending: Issue #172 (already open, RCA-14 v9 still in draft)

stories.title: #125 auto-revert bug fix (architect RC + dev impl + tester sign-off)
depends_on: Architect RC (root cause identification) — Sprint 4 P1 day 1
blocks: All PRs using cc:* label flips (Sprint 4+ every PR has cc:* on it)
scope_includes: Identify the auto-revert mechanism (per Issue #125 hypothesis: orchestrator auto-hygiene watcher, CI label-check, architect watcher, or PM watcher)
Fix the auto-revert bug (cache update, watcher disable, or audit trail per Issue #125 options a/b/c)
Regression test: 3 PRs in a row do not experience cc:* auto-revert within 90s
Update CLAUDE.md §Handoff Discipline if doctrine needs amendment
out_of_scope: Rewriting the entire watcher (TD-009 already covered worktree pattern)

stories.title: RCA-15 close — owner pre-req applied + v9 deploy verified + PR #172 close
depends_on: Owner pre-req (4-step systemd setup per Issue #175) — BLOCKING
scope_includes: Owner apply 4-step pre-req: (1) install unit file, (2) loginctl enable-linger atilcan, (3) daemon-reload, (4) enable atilcalc-web.service
First v9 auto-deploy → exit 0 (or exit-with-rollback per ADR-0027 §3)
Service alive 5+ min post-deploy verified
PR #172 close as superseded (v9 is on main via PR #174)
out_of_scope: Reverting PR #174 (architect hard rule + owner decision: keep v9)

stories.title: #102 doctrine gap A11-ext — owner-override PR merge design drift consolidation
scope_includes: Consolidate PR #174 + #81 + #122 + #125 + RCA-15 into a single doctrine gap post-mortem
Choose between options (a) spec-pin gate, (b) belt-and-suspenders, (c) owner-override accountability — per Issue #102 proposed options
Owner decision on the chosen option
Document the chosen option in ADR-0033 (or amend ADR-0015)
